name: JOP
description: JOPs all-in-one platform empowers businesses with clear goal setting and real-time performance monitoring Learn more about JOP

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months
reviews.review_description: JOP is good tool to monitor time bound actions, it gives clarity on your quarterly deliverables and can be tracked at ant time.
reviews.review_pros: Ease of access, Progress tracking and tracking past performance. Able to see company's OKR and can align with that.
reviews.review_cons: Unable to replicate OKR of previous Quarter, always we have to add OKR for new quarter. Some copy / forward OKR option shall be there.

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial
reviews.review_description: I am using JOP for past one year and my company is accessing employee performance based on JOP only.
reviews.review_pros: It the best online system to review employee's performance on a quarterly basis.
reviews.review_cons: There is nothing to highlight adverse on JOP. As it is very good platform for an employee to progress

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial
reviews.review_pros: Time objectives key result area showing best indicators
reviews.review_cons: Everything is fine in JOP but needs more improvements

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: I am happy and will update quartely and review the same
reviews.review_pros: Quarterly achievements and their progress
reviews.review_cons: There is no adverse comments on implementation of JOP

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years
reviews.review_description: I enjoyed a lot and can evaluate my performance by my self.
reviews.review_pros: Performance of your work is acknowledged. All data are in open platform.
reviews.review_cons: It can be more easy to handle. It can be short and more specific.

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months
reviews.review_description: It is good but can be better with more user friendly.
reviews.review_pros: It's significant interlinking of Goals among various departments of an Organisation.
reviews.review_cons: Many unwanted collaboration in other's Goals.

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: Very Good experience Overall, It Will Be Very Usefull
reviews.review_pros: Performance Is Very Outstanding Very Satisfy With It
reviews.review_cons: Slow Work Sometimes While Working On Some Work

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months
reviews.review_pros: 1. Many activities mapped 2. Superior can give comments

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: This is supporting as all desired information available at one platform.
reviews.review_pros: Good to use as tracker. We can see the reason of deviation day to day in our targets
reviews.review_cons: close loop to see the performance, corrective action and support required by other team members.

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: 2+ years
reviews.review_description: Jop is an useful program for a good management and business development.
reviews.review_pros: The program help to view the performance and management solutions for any current companies situations.
reviews.review_cons: Jop allowed any organization or companies to focus on business goal as individual or as a team.

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: 2+ years
reviews.review_description: Fully satisfied and absolutely amazing interface for seamless growth.

reviews.review_cons: Nothing as such. its meets all the requisite parameters.

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_pros: Since I have started using JOP for 1 month, I have found how effective it is in terms of taking our work seriously, focusing in our tasks, Reporting to our Seniors, and even in Individual way it has enhanced my performance.
reviews.review_cons: I like the product, it is an essential tool which needs to be opted by every industry.

reviews.review_title: JOP - An awesome Tool to Track & Grow !
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months
reviews.review_description: Since I have started using JOP since last couple of months, I have found it to be superb effective in terms of taking our work seriously, focusing in our tasks, reporting to our Seniors and even enhancing my individual performance.
reviews.review_pros: • Motivated and empathetic leaders • Flexible timings • Engaging culture • Opportunity to grow as a professional
reviews.review_cons: • Longer working hours • Change management is quite dynamic inside

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years
reviews.review_description: overall experience was enriching and smooth.
reviews.review_pros: It helps our multiple teams align on core company objectives and work towards them in alignment to vision of management
reviews.review_cons: not anything particularly

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months
reviews.review_description: Overall good tool to improve organization performance along with individual peformance on professional way, data trend, tracking and recogniation
reviews.review_pros: Recognize your team members with badges with peformance tracking on a transparent way and enjoy your work, take corrective messures when things are not moving on right direction based on progress chart of Goals, KRAs
reviews.review_cons: Needs to be sync with SAP and other application so that requied data should be authenticate instead of manually checking. Also numbers should be cross check with organization leval in place of an individual put their score abrantly

reviews.review_title: its good to use JOP for proper goal tracking
